channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [PV] Anime News Network Silent Hill f, KPop Demon Hunters, Exit 8 Win Awards at Golden 预告PV Awards
item.description: Chainsaw Man – The Movie: Reze Arc, live-action Street Fighter film, The Super Mario Galaxy Movie also nominated ― The Golden Trailer Awards — which recognize the year's most outstanding achievements... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Silent Hill f, KPop Demon Hunters, Exit 8 Win Awards at Golden Trailer Awards

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network HIDIVE Adds Urashiman, Ippatsuman, Heavy Metal L-Gaim, Judo Boy, More 动画
item.description: Also: Mecha-Doc, Paul's Miraculous Adventures, Jewel Bem Hunter Lime, more ― HIDIVE announced on Monday that it is adding the following titles to its service. The anime all stream in Japanese with... | 来源: ANN | 原文: HIDIVE Adds Urashiman, Ippatsuman, Heavy Metal L-Gaim, Judo Boy, More Anime

item.title: [动画][剧场版] Anime News Network Galaxy Express 999 TV 动画, Lupin III Film的 Lyricist Jun Hashimoto Dies
item.description: Hashimoto died due to liver cirrhosis at 86 ― Lyricist Jun Hashimoto died in a Tokyo hospital on May 21 due to liver cirrhosis. He was 86. The family held a private funeral attended only by close... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Galaxy Express 999 TV Anime, Lupin III Film's Lyricist Jun Hashimoto Dies

item.title: [动画][剧场版][CAST] Anime News Network You, Fireworks, Our Promise 动画 Film Casts 3 AVAM Idols
item.description: Nanami Saiki, Hanaka Kikyō, Yuka Himemiya voice classmates in July 17 film ― The staff for the anime film of Kaori Mado's You, Fireworks, and Our Promise (Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to or Kimi-Hana... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'You, Fireworks, and Our Promise' Anime Film Casts 3 AVAM Idols

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Cyborg 009: Nemesis 动画 Casts Tomokazu Sugita as Cyborg 004
item.description: Sugita voices Albert Heinrich in upcoming summer series ― The staff of Ishimori Production's Cyborg 009: Nemesis, a new anime based on Shōtarō Ishinomori's Cyborg 009 manga, announced on Tuesday that... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Cyborg 009: Nemesis Anime Casts Tomokazu Sugita as Cyborg 004

item.title: [剧场版][CAST] Anime News Network 2026 Anpanman Film Casts Kenjirō Tsuda
item.description: Tsuda plays film's key character Nyakkuru as his 1st role in franchise ― The staff for Soreike! Anpanman: Pantan to Yakusoku no Hoshi (Pantan and the Promised Star), the 37th film in the franchise,... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 2026 Anpanman Film Casts Kenjirō Tsuda
